basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Warangal. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be provided as per the norms and guidelines of the Institute.

qualification.details: B.Tech/ B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering and M.Tech/ M.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent with Research areas in Signal Processing / Communication / Instrumentation. Minimum 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/ GEN-EWS/ OBC-NCL; 55% or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ ST/ PwD. GATE Qualification highly preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Warangal is 26th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/B.E degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering and an M.Tech/M.E degree in the same or related fields like Signal Processing or Communication. GATE qualification is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 30 years. Age relaxation may be provided as per the institute's guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Junior Research Fellow position will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send them to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview, which may be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal), specifically for the ECE department under the ANRF-ARG project.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a contractual role, meaning it is a temporary appointment.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
